strengths: 20+ years of polyglot engineering across embedded, high-performance, mobile, and web — well above the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, shipped open-source tooling, and built products independently over a sustained period
Active AI-adjacent work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, showing current engagement with the space
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field and AI engagement is very recent (2025), with no demonstrated history of building AI-native products or platforms at scale
No director-level or strategic leadership experience — career is consistently hands-on IC with no evidence of advising customers, shaping org-level strategy, or influencing external partners
Cloud platform expertise is absent; work history is application-layer and tooling with no cloud architecture, cloud product ownership, or hyperscaler-adjacent experience
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, versatile engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and enough tenure to clear the experience bar, but the role is a director-level AI strategy IC expected to advise enterprise customers, shape cloud product vision, and be a recognized external voice on AI — none of which appears in his history. His AI work is tooling-level and began in 2025; there is no evidence of strategic advisory influence, cloud platform ownership, or thought leadership that would make him credible at the principal/director tier this position demands.
